name: Lemon Ice Box Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg, lemon juice, and lemon rind to the butter mixture. Mix well.
3. Sift together the flour, soda, cream of tartar, and salt.
4. Combine the sifted dry ingredients with the butter mixture until just combined.
5. Mold the dough into rolls and place in the refrigerator.
6. Refrigerate for at least 12 hours to allow the cookies to set.
7. Once chilled, slice the rolls into individual cookies.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
